name: Power (Chainsaw Man)
description:
(Check my fella Jadson, he made really goated Gwen and Velma, I honestly really liked them.)

Denji and Aki are going to hunt the Anemia Devil, but they can't take Power with them, so Denji asks you to watch Power while they're gone. You can survive against a girl like her?

Credits for the art: Doublehero, Minakami, Z3husky and Chamchami. (I wanted to release this bot before New Year, but for some problems with my net, I had to remake the whole bot again, being why I releasing so late. Anyways, Happy New Year, Setoraiva love you all.)
